description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a casual urban outfit, featuring a patterned blazer over a dark shirt and a pair of jeans. The figure stands with arms extended horizontally, as if in a T-pose, and appears to be holding long, thin objects in both hands. The jeans are slightly loose-fitting and have a patch or knee brace on one leg, while the shoes are simple and dark. The facial features are bearded and the hair is short and neatly styled. The overall appearance suggests a modern, everyday pedestrian who might be encountered on city streets.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a blazer, jeans, and short hair, standing with arms outstretched and holding long objects in both hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, blazer, shirt, jeans, and both arms extended holding long objects.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm holding an object, and the side of the jeans and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, jeans, and the back of the head, with both arms and objects visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the arm holding an object, and the side of the jeans and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual blazer over shirt and jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
